chunks.title: Aseprite v1.3.3
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: aseprite/aseprite
Release: Aseprite v1.3.3
Tag: v1.3.3; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-02-15T16:37:59Z; created_at: 2024-02-12T21:53:15Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Fix recovering of old crashed sessions having sprites containing slices by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4200
* Unified menu indication text, add double quotation marks by @TakWolf in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4197
* Fix some strings format to weblate by @TakWolf in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4207
* Fix several sync issues locking the sprite correctly on each script Tx by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4223
* Avoid div by zero by preventing returning a grid bounds with zero width or height  by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4232
* Fx Alt+T -> Alt+V instantly crashes Aseprite without warning (fix #4221) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4238
* Prevent setting slider ranges with min > max  by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4235
* Add the user directory as the first path to search for the tags palette by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4270
* Fix Aseprite built-in file selector's file list layout to avoid horizontal scrolling by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4273
* Fix deleting the "Pixel-perfect" checkbox from the "Spray Tool" (fix #4220) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4285
* Fix how separators are added into dialog's tabs by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4295
* Fix wrong edges on Brush Preview on Tilemap Mode (fix #4176) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4264
* Add option to play subtags & repetitions when exporting animations by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4211
* Avoid exposing doc::frames types to the global namespace by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4298
* Fix tabs ID handling in scripting engine by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4277
* Allow selecting how the user wants to see the opacity/alpha values by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4262
* Fix HSV/HSL values on ColorSliders by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4073
* Fix exporting one tag without "play subtags/repeats" and changing itsanidir by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4302
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.2...v1.3.3
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the aseprite/aseprite release v1.3.3, the update includes fixes for recovering old crashed sessions with sprites containing slices, unified menu indication text, several sync issues locking the sprite correctly in scripts, a division by zero prevention for grid bounds, a crash fix for Alt+T to Alt+V, prevention of setting slider ranges with min > max, adding the user directory as the first path to search for the tags palette, fixing the built-in file selector's file list layout to avoid horizontal scrolling, removing the 'Pixel-perfect' checkbox from the Spray Tool, fixing how separators are added into dialog tabs, fixing wrong edges on Brush Preview in Tilemap Mode, adding an option to play subtags and repetitions when exporting animations, avoiding exposing doc::frames types to the global namespace, fixing tabs ID handling in the scripting engine, allowing selection of how opacity/alpha values are displayed, fixing HSV/HSL values on ColorSliders, and fixing exporting one tag without 'play subtags/repeats' and changing its animation direction.

* Fixed identify running Aseprite processes correctly to recover crashed sessions [#4130](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4130)
* Lua: Fixed critical bug running commands and other functions inside transactions [#4310](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4310)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.3...v1.3.4

chunks.title: Aseprite v1.3.5
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: aseprite/aseprite
Release: Aseprite v1.3.5
Tag: v1.3.5; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-02-28T13:00:16Z; created_at: 2024-02-27T16:23:04Z
Release notes:
## What's Changed
* Drop selection when we hide a layer, should fix some issues moving hidden layers [#4179](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4179) [#3254](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3254)
* Fixed slice tool when used in tilemap layers and Manual mode [#4290](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4290)
* Fixed crash exporting one frame animation of a ping-pong tag [#4336](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4336)
* Steam: New `-noinapp` option for Steam version to avoid showing that we're *"in game"* [#4314](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4314)
* Windows: Remove verbosity in Aseprite description [#4333](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4333)
* Write smaller palettes in `.aseprite` if possible [#4322](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4322)
* Fixed crashes using some broken themes [#4015](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4015)
* Fixed several crashes when there is no more enough memory [#4316](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4316)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.4...v1.3.5
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the aseprite/aseprite release v1.3.5, the update drops selection when hiding a layer to fix issues moving hidden layers, fixes the slice tool when used in tilemap layers and Manual mode, fixes a crash exporting one frame animation of a ping-pong tag, adds a new -noinapp option for the Steam version to avoid showing 'in game' status, removes verbosity in the Aseprite description on Windows, writes smaller palettes in .aseprite files if possible, fixes crashes using some broken themes, and fixes several crashes when there is no more enough memory.

chunks.title: Aseprite v1.3.6
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: aseprite/aseprite
Release: Aseprite v1.3.6
Tag: v1.3.6; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-04-09T13:28:08Z; created_at: 2024-04-08T16:23:38Z
Release notes:
## Release Notes
* New Afrikaans, Arabic, Dutch, Japanese, and Turkish translations, [thanks to several contributors](https://github.com/aseprite/strings?tab=readme-ov-file#aseprite-translations)
* Fixed some random crashes when resizing sprites [#4315](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4315)
* Fixed bug updating the correct copy+move cursor in the timeline [#3887](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3887), thanks to [@cbradl406](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4369)
* Minor UI improvements in *File > Export > Export As* dialog [#4308](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4308)
* Windows:
* Disable Windows Ink feedback when clicking [#3879](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3879)
* Fixed Aseprite icon of the main window when Windows is configured with 175% or 125% of DPI [#3034](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3034)
* Fixed title bar flickering selecting menus and dialogs
* Linux/X11:
* Fixed [picking colors from desktop](https://twitter.com/aseprite/status/1397596285587410956) outside the main window [#3192](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3192)
* Fixed bug where sometimes key modifiers (Ctrl, Alt, Shift) kept stuck [#4368](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4368)
## PRs
* Fix copy+move cursor icon bug (fix #3887) by @cbradl406 in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4369
* Fix crashes with SpriteJob(s) that weren't locking the doc correctly by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4384
## New Contributors
* @cbradl406 made their first contribution in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4369
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.5...v1.3.6
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the aseprite/aseprite release v1.3.6, the update adds new Afrikaans, Arabic, Dutch, Japanese, and Turkish translations, fixes some random crashes when resizing sprites, fixes a bug updating the correct copy+move cursor in the timeline, makes minor UI improvements in File > Export > Export As dialog, disables Windows Ink feedback when clicking on Windows, fixes the Aseprite icon of the main window when Windows is configured with 175% or 125% DPI, fixes title bar flickering selecting menus and dialogs on Windows, fixes picking colors from desktop outside the main window on Linux/X11, fixes a bug where sometimes key modifiers (Ctrl, Alt, Shift) kept stuck on Linux/X11, and includes PRs fixing copy+move cursor icon bug and crashes with SpriteJob(s) that weren't locking the doc correctly.

chunks.title: Aseprite v1.3.7
chunks.raw_text:
Repository: aseprite/aseprite
Release: Aseprite v1.3.7
Tag: v1.3.7; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-05-21T15:19:25Z; created_at: 2024-05-21T01:07:52Z
Release notes:
## Release notes
* Allow backslash (`\`) in filenames on Linux and macOS [#3936](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3936)
* Fixed nested ping-pong tags [#4271](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4271)
* Fixed wrong alignment between mouse and sensor threshold position [#4428](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4428)
* Fixed painting with right-click with custom brush paints with background color [#4013](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4013)
* Lua API:
* New [app.os object](https://www.aseprite.org/api/app_os#appos)
* Added `recent` parameter to [SaveFile](https://www.aseprite.org/api/command/SaveFile#savefile)/[ExportSpriteSheet](https://www.aseprite.org/api/command/ExportSpriteSheet#exportspritesheet) commands to avoid adding the file to the list of recent files
* Disable progress bar in commands that can receive `ui=false` [#4165](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4165)
* Fixed bugs handling errors inside `app.transaction()` [#3276](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3276) [#4431](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4431)
* Fixed return values of `os.execute()`
* Ask permissions for `io.popen()`/`lines()`/`input()`/`output()` functions
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.6...v1.3.7
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the aseprite/aseprite release v1.3.7, the update allows backslash in filenames on Linux and macOS, fixes nested ping-pong tags, fixes wrong alignment between mouse and sensor threshold position, fixes painting with right-click with custom brush paints with background color, and adds Lua API enhancements: new app.os object, added recent parameter to SaveFile/ExportSpriteSheet commands to avoid adding the file to the list of recent files, disables progress bar in commands that can receive ui=false, fixes bugs handling errors inside app.transaction(), fixes return values of os.execute(), and asks permissions for io.popen()/lines()/input()/output() functions.

* Fix Ignore any third-party theme that uses "default" as ID (fix #4226) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4335
* Needed libwebP as a dependency on Arch Linux by @gabespound in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4587

* [docs] Improve phrasing for Tileset image data length by @drpaneas in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4590
* Reset mask when clicking outside of bounds with the magic wand tool by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4595
* Avoid div by zero by preventing returning a grid bounds with zero width or height (take 2) by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4597

Tag: v1.3.9; draft: False; prerelease: False; published_at: 2024-10-02T11:56:57Z; created_at: 2024-09-24T14:30:59Z
Release notes:
## Release Notes
* New Hungarian, Norwegian Nynorsk, Thai, and Ukrainian translations, [thanks to the help of several contributors](https://github.com/aseprite/strings?tab=readme-ov-file#aseprite-translations)
* Improved performance in *"Recover Files"* tab [#4610](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4610)
* Added *"Don't show this alert again"* when saving WebP files [#4658](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4658)
* New "Reset" page in *Edit > Preferences* [#4432](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4432)
* New *"Reset Symmetry to View Center"* option [t/19185](https://community.aseprite.org/t/19185) [#4638](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4638) (thanks to [@S4HRKBOY](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4640))
* New criterias to match similar RGB colors with color palette entries [t/9682](https://community.aseprite.org/t/9682) [#2787](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/2787)
* Fixed *"Merge Down"* command when the merged cels have a special z-index [t/22106](https://community.aseprite.org/t/22106) [#4468](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4468)
* Fixed bug where we weren't able to uninstall third party extensions [#4622](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4622)
* Fixed transparent color bugs converting between RGB <-> Indexed conversion [#4370](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4370) [#4438](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4438)
* Fixed moving multiple tilemap layers at the same time [#3144](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3144)
* Fixed right click action with shading ink is selected [#4520](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4520)
* Fixed bug where the first mouse click after a <kbd>Ctrl+Z</kbd> was ignored if we had <kbd>Ctrl</kbd> key configured to drag the "Brush Size" [t/22112](https://community.aseprite.org/t/22112) [#4484](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4484)
* Fixed duplicate items in keyboard shortcuts list [#4387](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4387)
* CLI: Fixed exporting Sprite Sheet with group names [#4456](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4456)
* Lua API:
* New `app.fgTile`/`bgTile` properties to get/set the foreground/background tile [#4403](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4403)
* Added `Site.tilemapMode` property
* Added `x` and `y` params to `app.command.Paste()`
* Fixed `app.command.Cut`/`Paste` in `-batch` mode [#4354](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4354)
* Fixed `app.command.Cancel()` command when used from scripts
* Fixed default `color`/`bgColor` params in `app.useTool()`
## Merged PRs
* Use right click action with shading ink (fix #4520) by @Liebranca in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4615
* Fix Cancel command do not work on scripting by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4621
* Adjust strings for clarity/correctness by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4629
* Fix multiple tileset layers selection move is broken (fix #3144) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/3891
* Fix exporting a Sprite Sheet with Group name has different functionality between CLI and Scripting (fix #4456) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4475
* Fix extensions wrongly being detected as "built-in" by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4625
* Fix scripting app.command.Cut() and app.command.Paste() does not work in --batch mode (fix #4354) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4446
* Avoid setting an invalid mask color (-1) in doc::Image (fix #4651) by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4653
* Release mouse before command execution on dragging value state by @Liebranca in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4611
*...

* Disable *Brush Preview* in *Preview* window by default [#4721](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4721) (thanks to [@S4HRKBOY](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4752)), can be re-enabled from *View > Preview > Brush Preview*
* Snap cels to grid on moving cel action [#4027](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4027)
* Fixed slice tool when we are in tiles mode [#4306](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4306)
* Fixed bug copying/moving cels with z-index [#4779](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4779)
* Fixed issues with windows visibility when changing between "Home" tab and sprites [#4546](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4546) [#4789](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4789)
* Fixed Duplicate Sprite/Layer didn't duplicate z-indexes [#4665](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4665)
* Fixed mouse issues making hard to resize floating windows [#4240](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4240)
* Fixed UI issue scaling brush type icons [#4386](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4386)
* Fixed crash clicking "Hide Other Layers" when there is no preview window [#4768](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4768)
* Lua API:
* Update [API version](https://www.aseprite.org/api/app#appapiversion) to 30
* Added `app.editor.zoom`/`scroll` properties [#4722](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4722)
* New option (`Dialog:show{ hand=true }`) to enable Hand tool in the active editor with a modal dialog (thanks to [@lampysprites](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4465))
## Merged PRs (some cherry-picked PRs may not appear)
* Snap cels to grid on moving cel action (fix aseprite#4027) by @Liebranca in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4646
* Fix slice tool for tiles mode by @Liebranca in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4705
* Fix MouseEnter and MouseLeave by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4718
* Add support jpeg Exif.Image.Orientation (fix #2525) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4694
* Fix scaling of brush type popup window's icons by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4710
* Revert wrapping MouseEnter/Leave messages into CallbackMessages by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4765
* Add build scripts by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4742
* Fix duplicate Sprite or Layer don't duplicate z-indexes (fix #4665) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4762
* Fix bug copying/moving cels with z-index (fix #4779) by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4782
* [lua] suggestion: move canvas behind foreground dialog by @lampysprites in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4465
* [lua] Add app.editor.zoom / scroll properties (fix #4722) by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4786
* Add function to copy non-shared properties between cels by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4783
* Refactor removing duplicated code with new WindowWithHand by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4784
* Fix color picker displaying issues by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4790
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.9.1...v1.3.10
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the aseprite/aseprite release v1.3.10, the update publishes HD icons, adds support for JPEG image orientation adjustment from EXIF metadata, disables Brush Preview in Preview window by default, snaps cels to grid on moving cel action, fixes slice tool when we are in tiles mode, fixes bug copying/moving cels with z-index, fixes issues with windows visibility when changing between 'Home' tab and sprites, fixes Duplicate Sprite/Layer didn't duplicate z-indexes, fixes mouse issues making hard to resize floating windows, fixes UI issue scaling brush type icons, fixes crash clicking 'Hide Other Layers' when there is no preview window, and adds Lua API enhancements: updates API version to 30, adds app.editor.zoom/scroll properties, and adds new option (Dialog:show{ hand=true }) to enable Hand tool in the active editor with a modal dialog.

## Merged PRs
* Fix timeline thumbnail zoom can't scale beyond 1:1 pixels (fix #4974) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4992
* Fix crash with custom pixel ratios (e.g. Size(4, 3)) (fix #4632) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4965
* Fix image:drawImage+BlendMode.SRC doesn't draw mask pixels (fix #5001) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5004
* Fix "Straight Line from Last Point” bug in Tilemaps (fix #4623) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4949
* Fix onionskin visiblity is not updated if cel is empty (fix #4969) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4994
* Fix Straight line via SHIFT + Tiled mode starts at wrong position by @lightovernight in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5029
* Fix set_sat() blend function by @Liebranca in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5002
* Fix when Slices are set to a semi-transparent color they become opaque as we draw by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5027
## New Contributors
* @lightovernight made their first contribution in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5029

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the aseprite/aseprite release v1.3.13, the update fixes 'Saturation' blend mode for layers, fixes drawing semi-transparent slices on the canvas, fixes straight line via Shift + click on Tiled mode and tilemaps on manual mode, fixes onionskin bug switching layer visibility, fixes crash rendering sprites with custom pixel ratios, fixes timeline thumbnails to use the full available space, and adds Lua API enhancements: updates API version to 32, doesn't allow to set invalid pixel ratios for sprites, and fixes Image:drawImage() when BlendMode.SRC is used.

* Fixed selection in text fields with special fonts [#5520](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5520)

* Fixed UI bug in Keyboard Shortcuts with the "Add" button in other languages [#5523](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5523)
* Fixed bug starting to drag the color palette after picking a new ink [#5547](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5547) / [t/27779](https://community.aseprite.org/t/27779)
* Fixed bug selecting a recent/pinned folder to export with relative paths [#5388](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5388)
* Fixed crash due big font sizes [#5535](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5535)

* Fixed several issues with multiple screens [laf#164](https://github.com/aseprite/laf/pull/164)
* Fixed crash using Select Used/Unused Colors when there is a pixel out of bounds [#5096](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5096)

Release notes:
## What's Changed
### Aseprite v1.3.17-beta1
* New option to paint/select rounded rectangles [#2184](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/2184)
* Moving the selection in Tiled Mode now works correctly [#1457](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/1457)
* Now mouse buttons (even X1 / X2) can be associated to commands / tools / drag values [#598](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/598) [#1793](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/1793)
* Avoid confusing UX creating new keyframes for slices [#5125](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5125) [#2284](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/2284)
* Avoid confusion with Slice selection search field [#5484](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5484) [t/27705](https://community.aseprite.org/t/27705)
* Don't modify the sprite when we just click/select slices [#5578](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5578)
* Lua API:
* Added Dialog `onresize` event [#4736](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/4736) [#5354](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5354)
* Fixed `Image:drawSprite()` call when the user is drawing [#3916](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/3916)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.16...v1.3.17-beta1
### Aseprite v1.3.17-beta2
* Fixed not responding menus after using Keyboard Shortcuts dialog [#5591](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5591)
* Fixed <kbd>Ctrl+drag</kbd> to start a new copy of the selection [#5585](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5585)
* Fixed <kbd>Shift+special mouse button</kbd> to drag values when the Pencil tool is selected [#5589](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5589)
* Fixed some customization to select quick tools using regular keys [#5588](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5588)
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.17-beta1...v1.3.17-beta2
chunks.memory_unit_text: In the aseprite/aseprite release v1.3.17-beta (tag v1.3.17-beta2), the update includes multiple sub-releases: v1.3.17-beta1 adds new option to paint/select rounded rectangles, makes moving the selection in Tiled Mode work correctly, allows mouse buttons (even X1 / X2) to be associated to commands / tools / drag values, avoids confusing UX creating new keyframes for slices, avoids confusion with Slice selection search field, doesn't modify the sprite when we just click/select slices, and adds Lua API enhancements: added Dialog onresize event, and fixed Image:drawSprite() call when the user is drawing; v1.3.17-beta2 fixes not responding menus after using Keyboard Shortcuts dialog, fixes Ctrl+drag to start a new copy of the selection, fixes Shift+special mouse button to drag values when the Pencil tool is selected, and fixes some customization to select quick tools using regular keys.

Release notes:
## What's new
* New options to extend the "Keep closed sprite on memory" time [#5603](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5603)
* Fixed square brush rotation direction [#5597](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5597)
* Fixed auto focusing layer name when pressing <kbd>F2</kbd> to rename the layer [#5609](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5609)
* Fixed regression painting selected text in text input fields [#5628](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5628) [#5643](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5643)
* Fixed a crash when doing 'Export As' for animation and the target file is read only [#5635](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5635) (thanks to [@nelson-steve](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5657))
* Fixed crash copying floating image when Tiled Mode is enabled [#5602](https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/issues/5602)
* +Changes from [v1.3.17-beta2](#aseprite-v1-3-17-beta2)
* Lua API:
* Update [API version](https://www.aseprite.org/api/app#appapiversion) to 39
* Fixed security issue where a script could gain already given access from other script
## PRs
* [lua] Fix Image:drawSprite() call when we're in the middle of a ToolLoop (part of #3916) by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5546
* Fix tiled mode when moving pixels  by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5369
* Make slice selection more clear (fix #5484) by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5490
* Add rounded rectangle support by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5405
* Add support to use mouse buttons (including X1 & X2) as shortcuts (fix #598) by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/4927
* Fix slices issues preferring just one slice keyframe by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5580
* Fix several regressions with key shortcuts by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5590
* Fix missing semicolon in build.ps1 PATH by @zegof in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5614
* Fix when pressing F2 layer name field does not auto focus (fix #5609) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5654
* Fixes issue #5635 fixed a crash when doing 'Export As' for animation and the target file is read-only by @nelson-steve in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5657
* Check if extension files are present to avoid crashes & issues by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5593
* Extend the "keep closed sprite on memory" time (fix #5603) by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5627
* Fix square brush rotation direction by @martincapello in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5598
## New Contributors
* @zegof made their first contribution in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5614
* @nelson-steve made their first contribution in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5657
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/compare/v1.3.16...v1.3.17

* [lua] Improve Dialog labels and buddy enabled handling (fix #5117)  by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5554
* Use obs::fast_signal by default for better performance and smaller widgets by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5703
* [Lua] Add eyedropper action to useTool by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5692
* Extension tests, add custom formats with saving and loading (#4950) by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5174
* Fix TextEdit selection clearing on right click menu by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5722
* Allow the CliProcessor to attempt to install extensions (fix #5744) by @ckaiser in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5748
* UI improvements for layer groups in timeline by @dacap in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5758
* Add power of two sheet size flag on CLI  by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5529
* Fix hidden layers affect z-index (fix #5681) by @Gasparoken in https://github.com/aseprite/aseprite/pull/5690
